program
      var $X_start as real = 0
      var $Y_start as real = 0
      var $Z_print as real = 0
      var $Z_safe as real = $Z_print + 19.5000
      var $jog_speed as real = 5.0000
      var $print_speed as real = 1.5000
      var $dwell_start as real = 0.0800
      var $dwell_end as real = 0.0800

      G90
      G1 X $X_start Y $Y_start F 20
      G1 A $Z_safe F 10
      ProgramPause()
      print_network($jog_speed, $print_speed, $X_start, $Y_start, $Z_print, $Z_safe, $dwell_start, $dwell_end)
end

G1 A $Z_safe F $jog_speed 

end

function StartExtrusion($dwell_start as real)
      DriveBrakeOff(Aa)
      Dwell($dwell_start)
end

function StopExtrusion($Z_safe as real, $dwell_end as real)
      DriveBrakeOn(Aa)
      Dwell($dwell_end)
      G1 A $Z_safe F 10
end
